description_long: This trolley features a robust wooden frame with a rectangular shape, reinforced at the corners with dark metal brackets for added durability. It has two spacious tiers: an upper tray-like compartment with raised edges to prevent items from falling, and a lower flat platform for additional storage or transport. The trolley is supported by four large, black metal wheels, which provide stability and ease of movement across urban surfaces. The wood is stained a deep brown, giving it a rustic yet industrial appearance suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The design is open on all sides, allowing easy access to both tiers, and the absence of visible handles suggests it is pushed by gripping the frame itself. No branding or signage is visible on any surface.
description: A sturdy, two-tiered wooden trolley with metal corner reinforcements and four large black wheels, featuring an open design and deep brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open upper tray, lower platform, and all four wheels with metal corner brackets visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the trays, the thickness of the wooden panels, and the wheel arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the open structure and wheel placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the tray depth and wheel configuration.
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, one at each corner, fixed
